title: InterGalactic Bank of Kuat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''InterGalactic Bank of Kuat''' was one of the financial institutions set up on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] during the rule of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

The InterGalactic Bank was perhaps the most prominent institution of its kind on Kuat, and had links to the vast banking world of [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]]. Much of the collateral controlled by the bank was stored on Aargau. The infamous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] stored his entire fortune in the InterGalactic Bank of Kuat, kept safe until the time his [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] son, [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], could claim his inheritance.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Maze of Deception]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
